dataset_note: 2014 coverage is limited to Jan-Feb in the source dataset and is treated as a short post-drift window.
method_note: ADF is removed from the final Phase 1 evaluation because unit-root testing is not a good match for mean-reverting household load.
threshold_note: A node is classified as drift-affected if its RMSE degrades by at least 10% between 2012 Q4 and 2013. This reflects moderate behavioral non-stationarity consistent with the observed KS shift in ToU nodes.

acceptance_checks.target: ToU distribution shift is statistically visible: KS statistic > 0.05 and p < 0.05.
ToU nodes shift more strongly than Std nodes in 2013.

acceptance_checks.criterion: ACF structure changes in ToU group
acceptance_checks.target: The ToU ACF curve changes materially between pre-drift and 2013.
Node outcomes show visible heterogeneity rather than a single uniform response.
Prefer at least 2 of 10 nodes above 10% RMSE degradation in 2013.
Temporal splits are strictly ordered and normalization is fit on each train split only.
